columns.dc:description: The name of the organisation to which the dataset relates.
A Uniform Resource Identifier (URI) which identifies the organisation.
The end date of the accounting period (month) to which the transaction applies, in the ISO international date format YYYY-MM-DD.
The organisational unit responsible for spending the money.
The name of the supplier or beneficiary.
The payment date as recorded in the department's purchase or general ledger, in the ISO international date format YYYY-MM-DD.
The actual value of the transaction (net amount) in GBP.
The value of VAT that cannot be recovered in GBP.
Description and details of the transaction.
Code used to identify the goods and services purchased.
The type of card used for the transaction, GPG for Government Procurement Card and CCC for Corporate Credit Card.
